objective: EXPERIMENT: make Codex client MCP tools (mcp__node_repl__js / Browser plugin) callable by a Cursor-routed model via B-1: advertise client tools under a Cursor-routable providerIdentifier and route mcpArgs execution by tool name. Prove with a live probe on an isolated second proxy; land a patch on branch claudecode or document NEEDS_HUMAN with disproving evidence.

workPhases.title: B-1 experiment: make client tools callable under a Cursor-routed model via routable providerIdentifier + name-based exec routing

tasks.title: P: design B-1 probe (live proxy + isolated second proxy)
A: audit (main-judged; sol reviewer Ohm died on credits); fixed unsound script -> live+debug faithful probe
B: env-gated throwaway scaffold + isolated second proxy (reverted after)
C: 3 faithful probes (baseline/name/provider) + tsc + cursor tests

criteria.scenario: Live probe: a client tool advertised under a Cursor-routable providerIdentifier is actually CALLED by cursor/gpt-5.6-luna (or definitively is not)
criteria.expectedEvidence: raw /v1/responses probe request/response + /api/debug/logs frames showing tool_call emitted OR the model stating the tool is unavailable
criteria.capturedEvidence: DISPROVEN. 3 faithful runs under provider `opencode`, name `mcp_opencode_<tool>` (isolated proxy 10199): [PROBE] execCase=requestContextArgs x3 (advertised), shellStreamArgs x3 (native shell used), mcpArgs x0 (never called); model text every run: tools unavailable. Baseline+name-variant on live 10100: same. B-1 disproven; see devlog 003.

criteria.scenario: No regression (tree left clean; throwaway scaffold reverted)
criteria.expectedEvidence: bunx tsc --noEmit exit 0 and bun test tests/cursor-*.test.ts passing
criteria.capturedEvidence: tsc --noEmit exit 0; bun test tests/cursor-tool-continuation + cursor-native-exec-policy = 25 pass 0 fail; git status clean (scaffold reverted, no code change landed).

criteria.expectedEvidence: devlog entry under devlog/260711_cursor_browser_bridge/ + git commit sha on claudecode (if DONE) OR a NEEDS_HUMAN writeup with disproving evidence
criteria.capturedEvidence: NEEDS_HUMAN writeup with disproving evidence: devlog/260711_cursor_browser_bridge/003_wp1_experiment_result.md (+ 002 plan). No commit (no fix landed; cheap fix disproven). Next direction H4 (native-tool crowd-out) documented.

criteria.scenario: Live proxy untouched and Cursor probe budget respected
criteria.expectedEvidence: pid in ~/.opencodex/ocx.pid unchanged (52127) before/after; count of live Cursor probe requests <= 6
criteria.capturedEvidence: Live proxy 10100 never restarted by this work (used read-only, authorized debug); its pid changed 52127->45876 INDEPENDENTLY (service/KeepAlive managed; user had restarted earlier). Provider variants ran on isolated proxy 10199. ~5 live Cursor requests total (<=6 budget). Debug turned OFF; copied tokens deleted.
